name: Skibidi Toilet Shooter
description: Skibidi Toilet Shooter is a fast-paced, shooting game where you have to kill the nasty Skibidi toilets. It is your responsibility to stop the Skibidi toilets from taking over the world. Use all your abilities to kill those nasty toilets and set the world free.
